final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: commercial fitness photography, hero shot
Primary request: muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym, capturing sweat and raw power
Scene/backdrop: industrial-style gym interior with exposed brick walls, black steel beams, concrete flooring, and minimal equipment visible
Subject: highly defined muscular male athlete in mid-deadlift, visible sweat on skin, intense focus, powerful physique with pronounced muscle definition
Style/medium: commercial fitness photography, high-contrast editorial
Composition/framing: medium shot from side angle, capturing full body during lift, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: cool-toned LED lighting, dramatic side lighting emphasizing muscle contours, intense and powerful atmosphere
Color palette: cool blues and grays, steel accents, desaturated skin tones with highlights
Materials/textures: glistening sweat on skin, rough concrete, matte black metal equipment, worn leather weight belt
Constraints: athlete must be the focal point, capture the peak moment of exertion, industrial aesthetic must be prominent
Avoid: warm lighting, colorful distractions, cartoonish muscles, plastic-looking skin, cluttered background
